canonical_question: What are the best JWT implementation patterns and pitfalls?
aliases: JWT algorithm selection RS256 vs HS256

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: RFC 8725 (Feb 2020) established JWT Best Current Practices; draft-ietf-oauth-rfc8725bis in progress (2025)

constraints: Always validate JWT signature with verify(), never decode() alone
Never allow alg:none in production -- disables signature verification entirely
Hard-code expected algorithm server-side -- never trust the alg header from the token
Always validate exp, nbf, iss, and aud claims
Use asymmetric keys (RS256/ES256) for distributed systems where multiple services verify tokens
Never store sensitive data (passwords, PII) in the JWT payload -- Base64 is not encryption
